name: Dim Carcosa
intro_text: This is Carcosa. It is not a place. It is not a time. It is what remains when the King in Yellow has consumed everything else.
The Lake of Hali stretches endlessly in every direction. The twin suns have set behind the black stars. The Pallid Mask watches from the distant shore.
There is one thing left to do. There has always only been one thing left to do.
setup_instructions: Dim Carcosa has no standard locations. The scenario is played on a narrative track.
Each act card contains its own location instructions — follow the text on the act card.
Hastur (03325) begins in play, set aside until Act 2 is reached.
Review all campaign log entries before beginning. Each record modifies the scenario.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — Hastur is defeated
text: It is done. Against all reason, against all odds, you have confronted the King in Yellow in his own realm and you have not blinked.
Carcosa fades. The twin suns rise. You find yourself in Arkham, in an alley you do not recognise, as the sun rises over the city.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators defeated Hastur. Campaign victory. Each investigator earns 5 bonus XP.*

R2.label: Resolution 2 — You found a way out
text: You could not defeat the King. But you found a crack in his domain — a door that did not belong here.
You stepped through it, and the door closed behind you. Carcosa remains. Hastur remains. But you are alive.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators escaped Carcosa. Campaign ends — pyrrhic survival.*

defeat.label: Defeat — Consumed by Carcosa
text: The King in Yellow extends his hand. You take it. There is nothing else to do.
Carcosa is eternal. And now, so are you.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated in Dim Carcosa. Campaign ends in defeat.*
